message:
fix(e2e): Fix E2E test bugs discovered during code review

- Fix fillContactForm helper to use click-based interaction for custom
  Select components (shadcn/ui) instead of .selectOption() which only
  works with native HTML selects
- Make keyboard shortcut test platform-agnostic (Cmd+K or Ctrl+K)
- Make breadcrumb link matching case-insensitive (CSS capitalize changes
  visual but not DOM text)
- Make popular topics count check flexible (>= 3 instead of exactly 3)
- Remove unused imports from contact-form.spec.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
